game_info.title: Lost in Dreams - A Magical Puzzle Adventure
game_info.concept:
Solve puzzles, riddles, and embark on an exciting journey of discovery! Join Toto and Gal as they explore dreamscapes and befriend magical creatures. Lost in their imagination, the brother and sister must stick together and solve puzzles to find their way home.

Buzz

"Ultimately, Lost In Play is like curling up with a good book, and four hours later you'll suddenly wonder where the time's gone." - Rock Paper Shotgun


About the Game

Help a brother and sister on an uplifting epic adventure to find their way home. Solving puzzles, escaping a horned beast and meeting quirky goblins are just part of the journey!



Lost in Play is a journey through childhood imagination with thoughtfully crafted puzzles and colorful characters. Play as a brother and sister duo on an adventure to find their way back home. Between reality and fantasy, the siblings explore the enchanted forest of a horned beast, start a rebellion in a goblin village, and help a team of frogs free a sword from a stone.

PUZZLES & MYSTERY
The bizarre and dreamlike world of Lost in Play is filled with mystery, unique puzzles, and mini-games. Challenge a pirate seagull to a game of clicking crabs, serve magical tea to a royal toad, and collect pieces to build a flying machine. Be a part of this modern point & click game that will reward your curiosity and leave you excited for the next piece of story.

IMAGINATION COMES TO LIFE
From what seems like a normal morning at home to a typical afternoon at the park, you'll soon find yourself on a whirlwind quest as you sneak into a goblin castle, explore ancient ruins, and soar atop a giant stork. Lost in Play takes you on a nostalgic roller-coaster!

AN INTERACTIVE CARTOON
With a hand-crafted style similar to animated shows from childhood, Lost in Play is a story meant for all. Whether you’re seeking wholesome delight or just a good time, the family can enjoy this story together.

GAME FEATURES:

  • A mysterious animated puzzle adventure.
  • Filled with magical and magnificent creatures.
  • Created with families in mind. Have your children watch you play!
  • No dialogue. Everything is communicated visually in a universal way.
  • Inspired by nostalgic TV shows such as Gravity Falls, Hilda, and Over the Garden Wall.
  • Play cards with goblins, build a dragon, and teach a sheep how to fly.
  • Includes 30+ unique puzzles and mini-games.
  • Catch a derpy chicken. Maybe.

ACCESSIBILITY
For detailed accessibility report please visit the family gaming database


Happy Juice Games previously worked on "The Office Quest" and is a studio that focuses on pushing the boundaries of animated adventure games. We hope you love our game as much as we loved making it.
game_info.description: Join a brother and sister duo on a magical adventure through dreamlike puzzles! Navigate through enchanted forests, solve creative riddles, and befriend mystical creatures. Work together to collect magical artifacts, unlock mysterious doors, and find your way home. Each puzzle brings you closer to reality as you explore this whimsical world of childhood imagination.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←→↑↓): Move the active character
Space: Switch between brother and sister
Shift: Interact with objects/puzzles
Z: Use collected items
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and character switching mechanics test. Validates that both characters can move independently and respond to input correctly. Tests the core navigation system.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the brother character using arrow keys in all directions. Press Space to switch to the sister. Move her around the level. Verify both characters stay within bounds and collide with obstacles properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Both characters should move smoothly with arrow keys. Space bar switches control between them. Characters respect collision boundaries and platforms. No movement bugs or glitches occur during extended play.

TEST_1.expected: Both characters should move smoothly with arrow keys. Space bar switches control between them. Characters respect collision boundaries and platforms. No movement bugs or glitches occur during extended play.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete puzzle-solving path to win condition. Tests the full gameplay loop from start to finish including collecting artifacts, solving puzzles, and reaching the exit portal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all magical artifacts and complete all puzzles. Both characters reach the exit portal together. Game transitions to win state with victory screen. All collectibles and interactions work as intended throughout the journey.

TEST_3.test_description: Puzzle interaction and item collection system test. Validates that puzzle elements respond correctly to player actions and items are properly collected and displayed.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Interact with various puzzle elements using Shift key. Collect scattered magical crystals. Activate pressure plates and switches. Attempt to use collected items with Z key on appropriate puzzle elements.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All puzzle interactions register correctly. Items are collected and shown in inventory. Pressure plates activate when stepped on. Switches toggle states. Item usage works on compatible puzzle elements. UI updates reflect collected items.

TEST_3.expected: All puzzle interactions register correctly. Items are collected and shown in inventory. Pressure plates activate when stepped on. Switches toggle states. Item usage works on compatible puzzle elements. UI updates reflect collected items.

TEST_4.test_description: Cooperative puzzle mechanics where both characters must work together. Tests scenarios requiring coordination between the brother and sister.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Position one character on a pressure plate while switching to the other to pass through opened doors. Have one character push movable blocks while the other climbs them. Test timing-based cooperative challenges.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Cooperative puzzles function as designed. Doors stay open while pressure plates are held. Movable blocks can be pushed and used as platforms. Both characters can interact with the same puzzle elements in sequence. No bugs occur when both characters are in proximity.

TEST_5.test_description: Creature interaction and NPC behavior test. Validates friendly creatures respond appropriately and provide hints or help when approached.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Approach various magical creatures scattered throughout the level. Use Shift to interact with them. Listen to their hints or receive gifts. Test if creatures animate and respond correctly to player proximity.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Creatures show idle animations and react when players approach. Interaction prompts appear near creatures. Hints or items are provided upon interaction. Creatures don't block critical paths. Multiple interactions work smoothly without state issues.

TEST_5.expected: Creatures show idle animations and react when players approach. Interaction prompts appear near creatures. Hints or items are provided upon interaction. Creatures don't block critical paths. Multiple interactions work smoothly without state issues.
